description: Per-interaction embodiment loop for OS-011 &body.browser: perceive the DOM/a11y state, enumerate policy-filtered affordances, execute one typed action, record the resulting TraceEdge, emit SurpriseSignal on forward-model prediction error. Each pass through the loop produces exactly one TraceEdge that feeds into &memory.episodic.store for procedural clustering and cross-machine replay.

phases.description: Capture the current browser state — URL, a11y tree with fresh @eN refs, viewport — as an EnvironmentObservation. Volatile fields (timestamps, cursor) are excluded from the replay-stable subset.
Enumerate the typed actions currently do-able, run each through the governance policy (&govern.identity), partition into allowed vs policy_filtered_out.

Execute exactly one TypedAction. Invariants: I1 perceive-before-act (stale refs rejected), I2 affordance-bounded (action must appear in the AffordanceSet), destructive actions require a fresh authorization block per OS-011 §4.4.

Assemble the TraceEdge (state_before, typed_action, state_after, latency, outcome_status, provenance). If the forward-model prediction (from dry_run) diverged from the observed state_after, emit a SurpriseSignal.
Finalize the trace at session end: stamp ended_at + outcome, submit to &memory.episodic.store (e.g. Graphonomous act(store_trace)). Clustered matching state_hash prefixes become procedural knowledge.

substrates.name: chromium
substrates.note: Chromium via the agent-browser CLI. Any CDP-compatible runtime works; the Simulator backend swaps this out for deterministic fixtures.

substrates.name: graphonomous
substrates.note: Accepts act(action: store_trace) and retrieve(action: replay).

consumes.note: Replay payload returned by retrieve(action: replay).

reference_implementations.name: body-browser (Simulator backend)
reference_implementations.conformance: OS-011 v0.1 §9 — 12/12 tests pass against BodyBrowser.Backend.Simulator

reference_implementations.name: body-browser (AgentBrowser backend)
reference_implementations.note: Subprocess adapter over the agent-browser CLI; interface documented, wiring pending.
